hotato
Self-hosted  ·  MIT

Testing and observability for AI agents

See exactly why a call passed, or failed. Five dimensions, scored separately, each with the evidence behind it.

$uvx hotato start --demo
conversation-test.v1 · support-bot call 8f2a
Deterministic checksbyte-stable, set the gate
Outcomerefund posted to the ledgerPASS
Policyrequired disclosure readPASS
Conversationtalked over the caller 1.32sFAIL
Speechlatency within budgetPASS
Reliability20 runs, all heldPASS
Advisorya model's read, logged
Model judgetone, sent to reviewADVISORY
Every dimension scored on its own. With the evidence behind each result.
